positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical depiction of an astronaut exploring a bioluminescent deep-sea trench. The astronaut, rendered in a sleek, retro-futuristic diving suit with glowing neon trim (teal and magenta accents), is suspended among vibrant, glowing coral formations and abstract deep-sea flora. The scene should feature strong silhouettes against a nebulous, dark void background. Focus on high contrast, dramatic rim lighting, and geometric composition. Style: Mid-century modern illustration meets vaporwave art. Perfect for a central, impactful chest print on apparel. Limited color palette emphasizing glowing blues, vibrant magentas, and deep space blacks. Ultra-detailed, vector-art quality.
negative: low quality, worst quality, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, poor composition, boring, sketch, photorealistic, messy lines
